revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: 新設
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Merge [[Category:佐土原藩]] into [[Category:Sadōhara Domain]] via bot
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Merge [[Category:幕末の薩摩藩]] into [[Category:Satsuma Domain during Bakumatsu]] via bot
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Merge [[Category:幕末の外交]] into [[Category:Bakumatsu Diplomacy]] via bot
Merge [[Category:江戸時代の戦い]] into [[Category:Battles of the Edo period]] via bot
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Merge [[Category:Battles of the Edo period]] into [[Category:Battles in the Edo period]] via bot
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q15472059)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat}} {{Catmore}}
{{citation needed|さつえいせんそう}} ==Local Content== {{Commonscat}} {{Catmore}} {{citation needed|さつえいせんそう}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:薩英戦争}} {{translated page|ja|Category:薩英戦争|version=95763514}} [[commons:Category:Anglo-Satsuma War]] [[ja:Category:薩英戦争]] [[ko:Category:사쓰에이 전쟁]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:薩英戦争の人物]] [[zh:Category:萨英战争]] {{wikidata link|Q15472059}} [[Category:1863 in Japan]] [[Category:19th-century wars]] [[Category:Anti-British sentiment]] [[Category:Bakumatsu Diplomacy]] [[Category:Battles in the Edo period]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Japan–United Kingdom military relations]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Sadōhara Domain]] [[Category:Satsuma Domain during Bakumatsu]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki but with commons link]] [[Category:Wars involving Japan]] [[Category:Wars involving the United Kingdom]] [[Category:wikimedia commons named categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat}} {{Catmore}}
